title: Define Captain action-specific evidence schemas
goal: Define action-specific evidence contracts for pr-merge, runtime-deploy, service-restart, fleet-mutation and cleanup-apply so each high-impact action has explicit required review, CI, human authorization, status projection and recovery evidence before any later execution path can exist.

acceptance.assertion: pr-merge evidence schema binds repo, PR number, head, diff, CI, review and human authorization.
runtime-deploy evidence schema binds service or repo, environment, projection, rollback and deployment boundary.
service-restart evidence schema binds host, unit, health projection, restart budget and recovery path.
fleet-mutation and cleanup-apply evidence schemas bind target, operation, dry-run/projection evidence and recovery or irreversibility records.

metadata.reason: PR #97 validates generic envelopes but does not define per-action evidence schemas for later execution authority.
